properties.name: Chichen Itza
properties.quest: Compare astronomy, ritual and political theatre.

properties.name: Teotihuacan
properties.summary: Vast planned city near modern Mexico City.
properties.quest: Study urban axes and monumental scale.

properties.name: Tikal
properties.quest: Ask how forest, astronomy and kingship interact.

properties.name: Palenque
properties.summary: Maya city famous for architecture and inscriptions.
properties.quest: Use writing to connect rulers, buildings and dates.

properties.name: Monte Alban
properties.quest: Ask why capitals are placed on high ground.

properties.name: Machu Picchu
properties.quest: Ask how terrain, water and ritual shape architecture.

properties.name: Nazca Lines
properties.summary: Large geoglyphs in the desert of southern Peru.

properties.name: Cahokia
properties.summary: Major pre-Columbian mound city near the Mississippi.
